rows.requirement: Create Phase 4 detail document before implementation
evidence: Phase 4 detail document defines objective, scope lock, functional scope, non-scope, domain model, API contracts, UI surfaces, E2E scenarios, tests, fixtures, exit gate, risks, and decisions
Scope is frozen around project lifecycle, stage gates, artifacts/approval basics, canonical tasks, role-based participants, My Tasks, and Kanban without Gantt/resource-leveling scope
rows.cleanup: No runtime writes; documentation-only contract block

rows.requirement: Define finite closed implementation tasks for P4
evidence: Functional scope table defines P4-001 through P4-010 with owner/module, expected behavior, acceptance criteria, E2E references, verification, task non-scope, and done evidence
Phase 4 requirements matrix pre-creates every P4 row as blocked until implementation provides fresh command evidence
tests: npm run verify:matrix -- docs/status/phase4-requirements-matrix.json exit 1 because P4 implementation rows are intentionally blocked before implementation
npm test exit 0, 26 files and 147 tests passed

rows.requirement: Define mandatory E2E matrix and fixtures for P4
evidence: E2E-030 through E2E-034 are mapped to Phase 4 roles, fixtures, test paths, expected results, and required assertion pattern
Verifier owns the exact required_e2e contract and ledger test_path contract for P4-001 through P4-010 so final phase exit cannot pass with deleted, prose-only, or arbitrary Phase 4 E2E references
